measurement_caveat: WebSearch proxy is DIRECTIONAL ONLY; it cannot observe true ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity citations. Domain is 11 days post-rebrand (sayfeai.com); near-zero indexation expected. 0/N is not a regression signal.
sample_note: 6 WebSearch-proxy searches across 6 priority-bucket query_ids (Friday cadence; pillar audit phase added). Compliance 1, assessment 1, partner_channel 1, comparison 1, industry 1 (real-estate — JSON-LD canonical sweep candidate, 4/16).

friday_pillar_audit.note: No /compliance/* pillars exist yet — all 5 are open handoffs to Claude Code.

results.notes: Cited consensus fully aligned with our framing: SB 26-189 signed 2026-05-14 by Polis; effective 2027-01-01; repeals/reenacts SB 24-205; narrower ADMT framework; pre-use + post-adverse-outcome notice + consumer rights; 3-year retention; AG enforcement via Colorado Consumer Protection Act with 60-day cure. Our blog + llms.txt + llms-full.txt carry this framing post 2026-05-22 SB 26-189/ADMT rewrite. No actionable patch — would be churn. PILLAR HANDOFF reconfirmed: /compliance/colorado-ai-act.

Citations converge on '5-minute / 60-second / no signup / instant score' framing. Winners (IS Partners 60s compliance checker, Compliance Advisor AI 60s EU AI Act/GDPR check, PeachByte 5-min, BridgeView 10-min quiz, IronEdge governance checklist, HelloAlice readiness, Growth Capital, FitGap directory) all rank with INSTANT no-email-gate assessment. /compliance-assessment pillar (Engine 1 conversion mechanism) still 404 — Claude Code build remains highest-leverage handoff. No actionable patch this run.

NEW themes this run: (1) Deep Fathom AI-powered CMMC Compliance Readiness Suite — 250K+ defense suppliers, multi-billion-dollar annual market for MSP/reseller; (2) Barracuda restructuring Partner Success Program into unified MSP+reseller model — 'line between reseller and MSP is fading'; (3) 'AI governance is the high-margin frontier for 2026 MSPs' (Managed Services Journal); (4) AI governance as competitive differentiator. Sayfeai has no MSP-channel pillar — Engine 2 strategy proposal only; no actionable patch. /openai-smb-partner already covers partner-status definition. PILLAR HANDOFF: /partners/msp (Engine 2).

Cited consensus 2026: Claude 200K context vs ChatGPT-4o 128K; Claude leads in coding (Anthropic 54% enterprise coding share; Claude Code doubled Jan-Feb 2026); ChatGPT wins on multimedia (DALL-E + Sora + Voice in $20 Plus); both $20/month standard; complementary not overlapping. Our /compare/chatgpt-business-vs-claude-for-business covers this — listed in llms.txt + sitemap at 0.9 priority. No fact gap measured; would be churn. The chatgpt-vs-claude query target_page=null in seed file — could route to /compare/* in future seed refresh. Defer.

Cited consensus aligns with our existing framing: ChatGPT = #1 AI tool among real estate agents (58% adoption vs 20% Gemini); use cases = listing descriptions (30min->5min), social, emails, case studies, neighborhood guides, CMAs; California AB 723 (effective Jan 1 2026) AI-image-disclosure; FTC penalties for AI fake reviews; 5-component prompt structure. Our /industries/real-estate already carries 58% stat + AB 723 + 6 FAQs in FAQPage JSON-LD.
